title: Canada's bill C-22 mandates mass metadata surveillance of Canadians
author: opengrass
aiHeadline: Canadians now have the honor of being spied on by their government in real-time, all while the Prime Minister insists it's for our own good.

title: $96 3D-printed rocket that recalculates its mid-air trajectory using a $5 sensor
author: ZacnyLos
aiHeadline: Meet the $96 3D-printed rocket that's probably going to crash into your house, thanks to a $5 sensor that somehow manages to do calculus mid-flight.

title: Chrome DevTools MCP
author: xnx
aiHeadline: Chrome DevTools finally gets an update that makes debugging your browser session slightly less frustrating, because who doesn't love staring at code all day?

title: The Appalling Stupidity of Spotify's AI DJ
author: ingve
aiHeadline: Spotify's AI DJ is now officially the worst DJ ever, proving that even robots can't figure out how to play two songs in a row without making you want to throw your phone out the window.

title: The 49MB web page
author: kermatt
aiHeadline: Web developers have outdone themselves by creating a 49MB webpage that takes longer to load than dial-up internet in the 90s, proving that progress is clearly not our thing.
